name: Shanghai Xinnanyang Only Education & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Xinnanyang Only Education & Technology Co., Ltd. primarily operates in the education and training sector in the People's Republic of China. The company provides K12 education services, such as middle school curriculum interest training, language training, children education training, adult education training, and education and training consulting services. It also offers vocational education services; management training services, such as corporate, civil service, manufacturing management, and high-end management training services; and international education services. In addition, the company manufactures precision products, such as hydraulic coupling, forging, and bronze products; and invests in, constructs, and operates terrestrial digital television service platforms. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
